pageProps.data:
Navigator

路由的跳转靠 Navigator 提供的方法进行实现。

// 陆游跳转Navigator.of(context).push(MaterialPageRoute(builder: (context) => const GoToPage(),),);
实例 // ignore: file_namesimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';import '../search/searchPage.dart';class HomeContent extends StatefulWidget {const HomeContent({super.key});@overrideState<HomeContent> createState() => _HomeContentState();}class _HomeContentState extends State<HomeContent> {@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Column(children: [const Text("hello,you click"),RawMaterialButton(fillColor: Colors.black54,onPressed: () {// 陆游跳转Navigator.of(context).push(MaterialPageRoute(builder: (context) => const SearchPage(),),);},child: const Text('搜索'),)],);}}
返回

使用 Navigator 下 of 方法的 pop 方法。

命名路由

需在跟组件进行定义，跳转使用 Navigator 的 pushNamed 方法。

Navigator.pushNamed(context, 'search');
命名路由传参

路由配置设定，代码固定：

import 'package:flutter/material.dart';// ignore: unnecessary_importimport 'package:flutter/widgets.dart';import '../search/searchPage.dart';Map<String, Widget Function(BuildContext)> router = {'search': ((context, {arguments}) => SearchPage(arguments: arguments)),};Route? onGenerateRoute(RouteSettings settings) {final String? name = settings.name;final Function pageContentBuilder = router[name] as Function;if (pageContentBuilder != null) {if (settings.arguments != null) {final Route route = MaterialPageRoute(builder: (context) =>pageContentBuilder(context, arguments: settings.arguments));return route;} else {final Route route =MaterialPageRoute(builder: (context) => pageContentBuilder(context));return route;}}return null;}

目标页面设定：

// ignore_for_file: must_be_immutableimport 'package:flutter/material.dart';class SearchPage extends StatelessWidget {final Map arguments;const SearchPage({super.key, required this.arguments});@overrideWidget build(BuildContext context) {return Scaffold(appBar: AppBar(// ignore: unnecessary_null_comparisontitle: Text(arguments != null ? arguments['id'] : ''),),body: const Text('搜索页面',),);}}
替换路由

页面路由替换而不是跳转。

onPressed: () => Navigator.of(context).pushReplacementNamed('/',),
跳回跟组件

直接清空路由，并跳回目标位置：

BackButton(onPressed: () => Navigator.pushAndRemoveUntil(context,MaterialPageRoute(builder: (context) => const TabsOfAppHome()),// ignore: unnecessary_null_comparison(route) => route == null),),
pageProps.title: 路由
